Off Calendar May-24-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-06-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement, Approval Of Class Notice, And Conditional Certification Of Settlement Class
Off Calendar Mar-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Attys. JEAN-PAUL LECLERCQ, ESQ. of Makarem & Associates, Tel No. 310-312-0299 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiffs;
Atty. MICHAEL H. KIM, ESQ. of Michael H. Kim, APLC, Tel No. 650-697-8899 also appearing for the Plaintiffs;
Atty. JAY WITHEE, ESQ. of Harnett Smith & Paetkau, Tel No. 650-568-2820 appearing for Defendant GMG Janitorial, Inc.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Matter argued and submitted. The Court orders as follows: Plaintiffs' Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement, Approval Of Class Notice, And Conditional Certification Of Settlement Class is granted with the following changes: There shall be no bar date for objections. Oral objections will be allowed at the final approval hearing. Plaintiffs counsel are to brief the issue of whether any case law exists to support the extended payment schedule requested in this matter. The payment to Plaintiffs shall be reduced to $5,000.00 each, subject to the Court revisiting this issue. A final approval hearing date shall be set in this matter for July 1, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. All other dates and deadlines shall be triggered by the July 1, 2016 hearing date. Parties shall revise and re-submit their proposed order to reflect the modifications addressed at today's hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
